description: CompositionWhite sweater made of 100% cotton, has a mock neck, full sleeves with ribbed cuffs, neck and hem, full front zippered placket, knitted design on the arms and placket, white fabric band stitched around the neck and brand badge embroidered on the left chestFitRegular Wash careHand wash in cold water with mild detergentDo not soak, wring or twistDry in shadeFold and stack to maintain shapeWarm iron; Do not iron on decorationsThis white sweater from spykar is a classic piece that every man should have in his wardrobe. Complementing both casual and formal wear, this sweater looks best when worn with a full sleeved shirt and dark hue formal trousers, while the cotton knit fabric offers snug warmth. Model StatisticsProduct is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18”
